arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Real Madrid sanction MAJOR deal as Amorim handed boost
arts.sum: Real Madrid are willing to sell Eduardo Camavinga this summer, according to reports in Spain, and Manchester United are pushing to complete a surprise deal for the 22-year-old. PSG are currently deemed to be the favourites in the race to sign Camavinga, but Man Utd and Bayern are also keeping tabs on his situation in Spain and are reportedly ready to intensify their pursuit over the next few months.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid name official squad for Man City clash as key centre-back returns for crucial Champions League fixture
arts.sum: Real Madrid name their official 22-man squad for Wednesday's Champions League knockout round playoff second leg against Manchester City at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Jude Bellingham Miss for Real Madrid Through Suspension?
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham could miss up to 12 matches for Real Madrid after his straight red card against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti in disagreement with Pep Guardiola over Man City's chances at Real Madrid
